reasoning: The control PM-17-b focuses on protecting information on external systems, which can be mapped to ensuring secure communication and logging in Kubernetes. This includes enforcing TLS for API server communications, validating audit logs, enforcing TLS in network policies, and ensuring TLS is enabled for ingress traffic. These checks collectively help in securing data in transit and maintaining integrity of logs.
title: Protecting Controlled Unclassified Information On External Systems - Review and update the policy...
